themes: Ed Oliver & Benford return to field
writeup: The Bills kicked off OTA Phase 3 at the Kaleida Health Performance Center with both Ed Oliver and Christian Benford returning to the practice field, easing concerns from earlier in the offseason. Offensive coordinator Pete Carmichael spoke about how his philosophy aligns with Joe Brady's offensive vision, emphasizing balance and maximizing Josh Allen's skill set. The team also made a roster move, adding linebacker depth after losing two inside linebackers during the practice window.
